title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at SRM University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
